ideas.title: Phase Work Tree
ideas.note: Add a diagram to the Overview tab to display the current phase tasks as a diagram with links showing dependencies and blockers to other tasks. Use blue to denote tasks ready to work, Yellow for tasks that are blocked and not yet ready., Red for tasks that are blocked and will not be unblocked by completing other tasks.

ideas.title: Brainstorm
ideas.note:
Idea -> Brainstorm -> Plan
Ideas have a "Brainstorm" button instead of a plan button. Then we replace the "New" plan rollup with a "Brainstorming" rollup. Show only our brainstorming metrics (Risk/Value/etc)

ideas.title: Merge Ideas and Planning modules
ideas.note: Ideas and Planning modules have overlapping concerns now that the Planning module drives document status transitions (planning→reviewed→accepted) on the unified IdeaPlan document. A merged module would eliminate the cross-module import boundary and make the document lifecycle ownership fully explicit. The planning module also has generic commands (build-plan, execute-plan-artifact, list-planning-types) that are not idea-specific — those would need to stay separate or be reorganized. Scope and impact need evaluation before committing.

ideas.title: Make brainstorming a real guided ideation session that seeds the plan
ideas.note:
Current Ideas -> Brainstorm -> Plan flow models "brainstorming" as a scoring survey: the agentDirective is a fixed 18-question form, the brainstorm-session record only stores 13 numeric scores plus 5 fixed text fields (additionalProperties:false), and update-brainstorm-session drops anything off its allowlist. There is nowhere to store agent-generated ideas, feature suggestions, perspectives, expectations, or a conversational transcript.

Worse, none of the brainstorm content seeds the plan: complete-brainstorm and buildInitialIdeaPlanPlanSection stub plan.summary from hardcoded strings, and buildIdeaPlanningPrompt never mentions the brainstorm. The synthesis only carries numeric scores forward.

Goal: brainstorming should be a natural guided chat where the agent contributes ideas/perspective/feature suggestions, offers save-and-return vs finish-and-plan each turn, stores the qualitative output in the session record, and uses it to stub the first draft of the plan when promoted.

Captured via dogfood: this idea is being run through the very Ideas -> Brainstorm -> Plan pipeline it seeks to fix.
